name: @aqa/cost
description: Cost governance for agentic-qa-kit: budget enforcement, kill-switch, token+USD rollups.

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const p of ['dist','.tsbuildinfo']) { try { rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }); } catch {} }"
